chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-296 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.08.2024 Miss Parivish khan advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto Assistant AG along with PI Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad. PI Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad files statement of SSP Hyderabad, taken on record. Learned AAG submits that official respondents undertake that no harassment is caused to the petitioners and protection will be provided to them as and when required. After such statement and undertaking, counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of instant petition, same is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
